name: Angelechy Shatranga
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners
You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; banish it. If this card is placed in the Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell: You can add 1 "Angelechy" Trap from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can only use each of the preceding effects of "Angelechy Shatranga" once per turn. While this card is treated as a Continuous Spell, your opponent can only attempt to activate up to 5 monster effects per turn.
